Aquamarine Hoshino (星ほし野の 愛あ久く愛あ海まりん, Hoshino Akuamarin?), or better known simply as Aqua (アクア, Akua?), is the male protagonist and one of the main characters of Oshi no. Ko. In his previous life, he was known as Gorou Amemiya, a doctor specializing in obstetrics and gynecology who was murdered by a stalker of one of his patients, Ai Hoshino, causing him to be reincarnated as his son.
